response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title '忘レジノ言ノ葉' and artists '未来古代楽団' from on-screen text during the live performance section. Performed a search for '"忘レジノ言ノ葉" "未来古代楽団" Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve both original and translated lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video starts with a title image and instrumental music, followed by a live performance of the song '忘レジノ言ノ葉' (Wasureji no Kotonoha) by Anya Melfissa.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa performs the song '忘レジノ言ノ葉' on stage. The song title appears in the lower-left corner.
scenes.song_title: 忘レジノ言ノ葉 (Wasureji no Kotonoha)
scenes.original_artist: 未来古代楽団 (Mirai Kodai Gakudan)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
言の葉を紡いで 微睡んだ泡沫
旅人迷いこむ 御伽の深い霧
差し伸べた掌 そっと触れる予感
受け止めて零れた 光の一滴
面影虚ろって 微笑んだ幻
想いの果てる場所 まだ遥か遠くて
求め探して 彷徨って やがて詠われて
幾千幾万幾億の旋律となる
いつか失い奪われて 消える運命でも
それは忘れられる事なき物語
指先を絡めて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Spinning the words, a drowsy bubble
A traveler wanders into the deep fog of a fairy tale
The palm I reached out, a premonition of gently touching
A drop of light that was caught and spilled
The image fades, a smiling phantom
The place where my feelings end is still far away
Seeking, searching, wandering, and eventually sung
Becoming thousands, tens of thousands, hundreds of millions of melodies
Even if it is fated to be lost, stolen, and disappear someday
That is a story that will never be forgotten
Intertwining our fingertips
